pi_items.source: Task description (task.json:5), setup_task.sh (lines 69-70), export_result.sh (line 33) all reference identical assignment name
Task description (task.json:5), setup_moodle.sh (line 323) creates course with shortname='BIO101', evidence_docs confirm course ID=2 with shortname=BIO101 and fullname='Introduction to Biology'
Task description (task.json:5) specifies 'Online text' submission, setup_task.sh (line 72) specifies 'Online text', export_result.sh (line 74) and verifier.py (lines 105-107) check for 'onlinetext'

privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_assignment@1' operates on a Moodle LMS environment with synthetic test data. The target course BIO101 ('Introduction to Biology') is pre-created in the setup phase with ID=2. The agent must create an assignment named 'Lab Report: Cell Biology' with a description about cell biology laboratory work, and enable 'onlinetext' (Online text) as the submission type. All three metadata claims match the task description and implementation files exactly.
